name: Alphabet Inc.
summary: Alphabet Inc. is a collection of businesses, the largest of which is Google. Google operates across two segments: Google Services and Google Cloud. Google Services includes products such as Search, YouTube, Android, Chrome, Gmail, Google Maps, Google Photos, Google Play, and Pixel devices. Google Cloud provides enterprise cloud computing and AI solutions. Other Bets include Waymo (autonomous driving) and Isomorphic Labs (AI-driven drug discovery). Alphabet has invested over $200 billion in R&D over the last five years.

products.name: Google Search
products.description: Search engine with AI Overviews and AI Mode for natural language and multimodal queries.

products.name: YouTube
products.description: Video platform for long/short-form content, streaming, and creator monetization via YouTube Partner Program.

products.name: Google Cloud
products.description: Cloud computing platform offering AI solutions including Gemini Enterprise and Gemini for Google Workspace.

products.name: Android
products.description: Mobile operating system powering a wide range of devices worldwide.

products.name: Chrome
products.description: Web browser and operating system platform used across devices.

products.name: Gmail
products.description: Email service with broad global adoption.

products.name: Google Drive
products.description: Cloud storage and file management platform.

products.name: Google Gemini
products.description: AI assistant and app powered by Gemini models for multimodal understanding and agentic capabilities.

products.name: Google Maps
products.description: Mapping and navigation platform available globally.

products.name: Google Photos
products.description: Photo storage and management service.

products.name: Google Play
products.description: Digital content marketplace for apps, games, books, and media.

products.name: Pixel 10 series
products.description: Latest generation of Google-branded smartphones integrating AI, software, and hardware.

products.name: Pixel Watch 4
products.description: Google-branded smartwatch from the latest generation of devices.

products.name: Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) - Ironwood
products.description: Seventh-generation custom AI accelerator chips used in Google's data centers.

products.name: Gemini 3
products.description: Most advanced AI model by Google with multimodal, agentic, and generative coding capabilities.

products.name: Demand Gen
products.description: AI-powered advertising product to find incremental conversion opportunities for advertisers.

products.name: Performance Max
products.description: AI-driven advertising solution helping advertisers maximize performance across Google platforms.

products.name: Product Studio
products.description: AI-powered tool for advertisers to create and enhance product content.

products.name: Waymo
products.description: Fully autonomous ride-hailing service operating in multiple cities.

products.name: Isomorphic Labs
products.description: AI-driven drug discovery company applying AI to accelerate development of new medicines.
